description: sprintf/strcpy/strcat fed by locally-constructed strings — no taint source involved. Layer D suppression (src/ast.rs::is_c_buffer_call_literal_safe) suppresses the strcpy/strcat with literal source; sprintf with bare `%s` continues to fire because precision-bounding is absent.

expected.notes: sprintf format `"%s, %s!"` has bare `%s` (no precision) so Layer D refuses to suppress.
